dev.jeka.core.tool

Class JkRunbase

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.tool.JkRunbase

  • public final class JkRunbase
extends java.lang.Object
    Execution context associated with a base directory.

    Each runBase has :

    • A base directory from which JeKa resolves file paths. This base directory might contains a jeka-src subdirectory and/or a jeka.properties file at its root.
    • A KBean registry for holding KBeans involved in the run context. There can be only one KBean instance per class within a runBase.
    • A set of properties defined in [baseDir]/jeka.properties file
    • A set of imported runBase
    Typically, there is one runbase per project to build, sharing the same base dir.

      Returns the KBean of the exact specified class, present in this runbase.

      Finds and retrieves all child KBeans of the specified type from the current runbase's child runbases.

      Finds and returns a child JkRunbase instance with the specified name from the master runbase.

      Returns the list of registered KBeans.

      Retrieves the list of child JkRunbase instances associated with the current runbase.

      Returns the classpath used to compile jeka-src.

      Returns the dependency resolver used to fetch 3rd party build dependencies.

      Returns the exported classpath used by the JkRunbase instance.

      Returns the exported dependencies of the JkRunbase instance.

      Returns the complete dependencies of the JkRunbase instance.

      Retrieves a list of injected runbases associated with the current object's relative base directory.
      JkProperties getProperties()
      Returns the JkProperties object associated with the current instance of JkRunBase.
      boolean isForceMode()
      Checks whether the force mode is enabled in the behavior settings.

    • Method Detail

      • getDependencyResolver

        public JkDependencyResolver getDependencyResolver()
        Returns the dependency resolver used to fetch 3rd party build dependencies.

      • getClasspath

        public JkPathSequence getClasspath()
        Returns the classpath used to compile jeka-src.

      • getExportedClasspath

        public JkPathSequence getExportedClasspath()
        Returns the exported classpath used by the JkRunbase instance.

        The exported classpath is the classpath minus 'private' dependencies. Private dependencies are declared using @JkDep in a class that is in package with root folder name stating with _.

      • getExportedDependencies

        public JkDependencySet getExportedDependencies()
        Returns the exported dependencies of the JkRunbase instance.

        The exported dependencies is the dependencies minus 'private' dependencies. Private dependencies are declared using @JkDep in a class that is in package with root folder name stating with _.

      • getFullDependencies

        public JkDependencySet getFullDependencies()
        Returns the complete dependencies of the JkRunbase instance. This values to exported + private dependencies.

      • find

        public <T extends KBean> java.util.Optional<T> find(java.lang.Class<T> beanClass)
        Returns the KBean of the exact specified class, present in this runbase.

      • load

        public <T extends KBean> T load(java.lang.Class<T> beanClass)
        Instantiates the specified KBean into the current runbase, if it is not already present.

        Since KBeans are singletons within a runbase, calling this method has no effect if the bean is already loaded.

        Parameters:
        beanClass - The class of the KBean to load.
        Returns:
        This object for call chaining.

      • getBeans

        public java.util.List<KBean> getBeans()
        Returns the list of registered KBeans. A KBean is registered when it has been identified as the default KBean or when load(Class) is invoked.

      • findRunbase

        public JkRunbase findRunbase(java.lang.String name)
        Finds and returns a child JkRunbase instance with the specified name from the master runbase.
        Parameters:
        name - the name (the relative path from this runbase) of the runbase to find.
        Returns:
        the child JkRunbase instance with the specified name, or null if no such child runbase exists

      • getInjectedRunbases

        public java.util.List<JkRunbase> getInjectedRunbases()
        Retrieves a list of injected runbases associated with the current object's relative base directory.
        Returns:
        a list of injected JkRunbase objects derived from the runbase graph based on the relative path of the master directory.

      • getChildRunbases

        public java.util.List<JkRunbase> getChildRunbases()
        Retrieves the list of child JkRunbase instances associated with the current runbase. This method should only be called on the parent runbase; otherwise, an exception will be thrown.
        Returns:
        a list of JkRunbase objects representing the child runbases of the current runbase
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the method is invoked on a non-parent runbase

      • getChildRunbase

        public JkRunbase getChildRunbase(java.lang.String name)
        Finds and returns a child JkRunbase instance with the specified name. This method can only be invoked on the parent runbase. Otherwise, an exception will be thrown.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the child runbase to retrieve
        Returns:
        the child JkRunbase instance with the specified name, or null if no such child exists
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if invoked on a non-parent runbase

      • loadChildren

        public <T extends KBean> java.util.List<T> loadChildren(java.lang.Class<T> beanClass)
        Loads KBeans of the specified type from all child runbases of the current runbase. This method must be invoked on the parent runbase; otherwise, an exception is thrown.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of KBean to load, which must extend the KBean class
        Parameters:
        beanClass - the Class object representing the type of KBean to load
        Returns:
        a list of KBeans of the specified type found in the child runbases
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the method is invoked on a non-parent runbase

      • findChildren

        public <T extends KBean> java.util.List<T> findChildren(java.lang.Class<T> beanClass)
        Finds and retrieves all child KBeans of the specified type from the current runbase's child runbases. This method should only be called on the parent runbase; otherwise, it will throw an exception.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of KBean being searched for, which must extend the KBean class
        Parameters:
        beanClass - the Class object representing the type of the KBean to find
        Returns:
        a list of KBeans of the specified type found in the child runbases

      • getProperties

        public JkProperties getProperties()
        Returns the JkProperties object associated with the current instance of JkRunBase. JkProperties is a class that holds key-value pairs of properties relevant to the execution of Jeka build tasks.

      • getBaseDir

        public java.nio.file.Path getBaseDir()

      • getBuildable

        public JkBuildable getBuildable()
        Get either a ProjectKBean or a BaseKBean present in this runbase. The result is returned as a JkBuildable abstraction.

        This methods never returns null, if no such KBean is present in the runbase a ProjectKBean is created if the presence of *src* dir is detected, otherwise it returns a BaseKBean instance.

      • getBuildableKBeanClass

        public java.lang.Class<? extends KBean> getBuildableKBeanClass()
        Determines the class of the buildable KBean to use within the current run base. The method evaluates available KBean classes and directory structures in order to decide the appropriate KBean type.
        Returns:
        A class object representing a subclass of KBean. The possible return values are ProjectKBean.class or BaseKBean.class, depending on the presence of the classes or a specific directory structure. Never returns null, but BaseKBean in last resort.

      • registerCLeanAction

        public void registerCLeanAction(java.lang.String name,
                                java.lang.Runnable runnable)
        Register extra file-system clean action to run when --clean option is specified. This is used for KBeans as nodeJS that needs to clean an extra folder that does not belong to jeka-output.

        Important: This method should be called inside the a KBean #init() method in order it can be taken in account by the execution engine.

        Parameters:
        name -
        runnable -

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • toRelPathName

        public java.lang.String toRelPathName()

      • isForceMode

        public boolean isForceMode()
        Checks whether the force mode is enabled in the behavior settings. Force mode allows ignoring jeka-src compilation and dependency resolution failures.
        Returns:
        true if force mode is enabled, false otherwise.
